From the Feed

@jcwlunacy

@jcwlunacypinned

NEW JCW LUNACY — TITLE DOUBLE-HEADER! Caleb Konley defends the Lunacy World Championship against “Big Money” Josh Bishop, and Choppa City put the Tag Team gold on the line against The Backseat Boyz. Episode 91 is live now!

@jcwlunacy

Six-woman war: Alice Crowley, Hollyhood Haley J & Sonny Kiss take on J-Rod, Sophia Rose & Freya the Slaya. Whose side is Sophia really on?

@jcwlunacy

BLOODYMANIA 19 — two nights at the Gathering of the Juggalos. A year of Lunacy storylines comes to a head at the JCW Pavilion.

Updates

Straight from the carnival

What’s happening in JCW right now. Follow @jcwlunacy for the play-by-play.

Bloodymania 19: Two Nights at the Gathering

August 20–21, 2026 · The JCW Pavilion · Macks Creek, Missouri
  • Night 1Thursday night, midnight–2AM at the JCW Pavilion.
  • Night 2Friday night, 1–3AM at the JCW Pavilion.
  • StakesA full year of Lunacy storylines comes to a head — both nights are must-see.
  • WhereGathering of the Juggalos, August 19–22 — Mother Nature’s Riverfront Retreat, 878 Gardens Road, Macks Creek, MO.
Tickets & info

Episode 91: Title Double-Header

July 16 · 7PM Eastern · YouTube
  • TitleJCW Lunacy World Championship: Caleb Konley (c) vs Josh Bishop.
  • TitleJCW World Tag Team Championship: Choppa City (c) vs The Backseat Boyz.
  • MatchAlice Crowley, Hollyhood Haley J & Sonny Kiss vs J-Rod, Sophia Rose & Freya the Slaya.
Watch now

Episode 90: Dani’s Revenge

July 9 · 7PM Eastern · YouTube
  • AngleWomen’s World Champion Dani Mo looks for payback on her newly revealed father, Barnabas the Bizarre, after his cruel and controversial comments.
  • MatchJosh Bishop vs Father Bronson — and Vince Russo has a mission for Bronson.
  • Match#1 Contenders, JCW World Tag Team Championship: Willie Mack & 2 Tuff Tony vs The Backseat Boyz.
  • MatchJ-Rod vs Sonny Kiss · Steven Flowe vs The Purple Phantom.
  • AngleNobody has heard from “Big Al” Alice Crowley since the Hokane attack — and how will Big Vito respond to the JWO taking Vincenzo?
Watch now

New Lunacy: The Investigation Begins

July 2 · 7PM Eastern · YouTube
  • AngleWho is the father of Jasmin St. Claire’s baby? The investigation begins — fifty candidates and counting.
  • AngleBarnabas the Bizarre confronts his own daughter, Dani Mo, face to face.
  • AngleAre Vince Russo and Joel Gertner working together?
  • AngleBig Al goes on the hunt for Hokane.
Watch now

Friends Forced to Fight

November 13 · Psychopathic Records YouTube
  • Title2 Tuff Tony (c) vs Suicide — the champ defends.
  • MatchMatt Cross vs Ninja Mack.
  • MatchKongo Kong vs Willie Mack.
  • AngleBig Vito orders Steven Flowe to take out Cokane — or else.
Watch the show

Lunacy #55: 2 Tuff Country

October 30 · Hallowicked weekend, Detroit
  • Match2 Tuff Tony vs Matt Cardona.
  • MatchCrowley vs Haley J.
  • MatchKonley vs Ninja Mack.
  • MatchThe 2 Tuff Country Rumble — and more.
Watch the show

The Calendar

Annual lunacy

Live events across the country — and every August, the Gathering of the Juggalos.

Next · Two Nights

Bloodymania 19

August 20–21, 2026 · The JCW Pavilion · Gathering of the Juggalos

Two nights at the Gathering — Thursday night midnight–2AM and Friday night 1–3AM at the JCW Pavilion, Mother Nature’s Riverfront Retreat, Macks Creek, Missouri. A full year of Lunacy storylines comes to a head.

The flagship since 2007. Built by the first season of SlamTV!, headlined over the years by The Great Muta, Scott Hall, Justin Credible and 2 Cold Scorpio alongside the originals. If a story matters in JCW, it ends here.

Get to the Gathering
Supershow

Hatchet Attacks

Debuted May 17, 2008

Went live as JCW’s first internet pay-per-view, March 26, 2011 at The Rave.

Annual

Oddball Wrestling

Exactly what it sounds like

Crazy and outlandish characters, front to back.

Annual

Flashlight Wrestling

Lights out

Matches lit entirely by the crowd’s flashlights — a JCW tradition.

Annual

Hallowicked After Party

Every October

Wrestling continues after the annual Hallowicked concert in Detroit.

Annual

Big Ballas’ X-Mas Party

Season’s beatings

JCW closes out every year with a holiday show.

Games

Press start

Free, in the browser, right here. No downloads, no consoles.

Unlock at 300 points

Lunacy Unlocked

2D fighting · Free · No download · Online multiplayer

The official JCW Lunacy fighting game — take the champions of the roster into the ring — combos, weapons and pinfalls. Play solo against the AI or hit Quick Match for online battles, right on this page. Earn 300 points in your Juggalo Locker to unlock the Lunacy — watching episodes, calling your shots and finding secrets all pay out.
